index 4e7a5e7..a9c3b1f 100644

+++ b/packages/ui/src/engine/pixel-characters.ts
@@ -880,15 +880,183 @@
-  }
-  ctx.lineTo(30, 18);
-  ctx.closePath();
-  ctx.fill();
-  // Saw teeth highlights
-  ctx.strokeStyle = '#7a7a7a';
-  ctx.lineWidth = 1;
-  ctx.beginPath();
-  for (let i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
-    ctx.moveTo(20 + i * 2, 14);
-    ctx.lineTo(20 + i * 2, 18);
-  }
-  ctx.stroke();
-  ctx.restore();
-}
-
-function drawPotionShelf(ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D, x: number, y: number, s: number) {
-  // Shelf with detailed colored bottles, 28x28 px approx
-  ctx.save();
-  ctx.translate(x, y);
-  ctx.scale(s, s);
-  // Shelf frame (dark wood with grain)
-  ctx.fillStyle = '#4a2f1a';
-  ctx.fillRect(2, 4, 24, 20);
-  ctx.strokeStyle = '#3a2510';
-  ctx.lineWidth = 1;
-  for (let i = 4; i < 26; i += 4) {
-    ctx.beginPath();
-    ctx.moveTo(i, 5);
-    ctx.lineTo(i, 22);
-    ctx.stroke();
-  }
-  // Shelf boards with nails
-  ctx.fillRect(2, 8, 24, 3);
-  ctx.fillRect(2, 16, 24, 3);
-  ctx.fillStyle = '#3a2510';
-  for (let i = 4; i < 26; i += 6) {
-    ctx.beginPath();
-    ctx.arc(i, 9, 1, 0, Math.PI * 2);
-    ctx.fill();
-    ctx.beginPath();
-    ctx.arc(i, 17, 1, 0, Math.PI * 2);
-    ctx.fill();
-  }
-  // Bottles (red, blue, green) with highlights and shadows
-  const bottleColors = ['#c33', '#339', '#393'];
-  for (let i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
-    const cx = 8 + i * 8;
-    ctx.fillStyle = bottleColors[i];
-    // Bottle body
-    ctx.beginPath();
-    ctx.ellipse(cx, 14, 4, 6, 0, 0, Math.PI * 2);
-    ctx.fill();
-    // Bottle highlight
-    const grad = ctx.createRadialGradient(cx - 2, 12, 1, cx, 14, 5);
-    grad.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(255,255,255,0.5)');
-    grad.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(255,255,255,0)');
-    ctx.fillStyle = grad;
-    ctx.beginPath();
-    ctx.ellipse(cx - 1, 12, 2, 4, 0, 0, Math.PI * 2);
-    ctx.fill();
-    // Bottle shadow
-    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.2)';
-    ctx.beginPath();
-    ctx.ellipse(cx + 1, 16, 2, 4, 0, 0, Math.PI * 2);
-    ctx.fill();
-    // Bottle outline
-    ctx.strokeStyle = '#222';
-    ctx.lineWidth = 1;
-    ctx.beginPath();
-    ctx.ellipse(cx, 14, 4, 6, 0, 0, Math.PI * 2);
+// ─── Pixel Art Character Drawing with Proper Proportions ─────────────
+
+// Each character is 16x24 pixels, drawn with Canvas 2D API, using pixel-level fills.
+// Characters have outlines, shading gradients, and distinctive features per role.
+
+// Palette helper for shading
+function drawPixel(ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D, x: number, y: number, color: string) {
+  ctx.fillStyle = color;
+  ctx.fillRect(x, y, 1, 1);
+}
+
+// Outline color for all characters
+const OUTLINE_COLOR = '#1a1018';
+
+// Draw head with skin, hair, and outline
+function drawHead(ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D, x: number, y: number, palette: Record<string, string>, hairPattern: string[]) {
+  // Head is 6x6 pixels
+  for (let py = 0; py < hairPattern.length; py++) {
+    const row = hairPattern[py];
+    for (let px = 0; px < row.length; px++) {
+      const c = row[px];
+      if (c === ' ') continue;
+      const color = palette[c] || OUTLINE_COLOR;
+      drawPixel(ctx, x + px, y + py, color);
+    }
+  }
+  // Outline head
+  ctx.strokeStyle = OUTLINE_COLOR;
+  ctx.lineWidth = 1;
+  ctx.strokeRect(x, y, 6, 6);
+}
+
+// Draw torso with clothing colors and shading
+function drawTorso(ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D, x: number, y: number, palette: Record<string, string>, torsoPattern: string[]) {
+  for (let py = 0; py < torsoPattern.length; py++) {
+    const row = torsoPattern[py];
+    for (let px = 0; px < row.length; px++) {
+      const c = row[px];
+      if (c === ' ') continue;
+      const color = palette[c] || OUTLINE_COLOR;
+      drawPixel(ctx, x + px, y + py, color);
+    }
+  }
+  // Outline torso
+  ctx.strokeStyle = OUTLINE_COLOR;
+  ctx.lineWidth = 1;
+  ctx.strokeRect(x, y, torsoPattern[0].length, torsoPattern.length);
+}
+
+// Draw legs with shading and outline
+function drawLegs(ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D, x: number, y: number, palette: Record<string, string>, legsPattern: string[]) {
+  for (let py = 0; py < legsPattern.length; py++) {
+    const row = legsPattern[py];
+    for (let px = 0; px < row.length; px++) {
+      const c = row[px];
+      if (c === ' ') continue;
+      const color = palette[c] || OUTLINE_COLOR;
+      drawPixel(ctx, x + px, y + py, color);
+    }
+  }
+  // Outline legs
+  ctx.strokeStyle = OUTLINE_COLOR;
+  ctx.lineWidth = 1;
+  ctx.strokeRect(x, y, legsPattern[0].length, legsPattern.length);
+}
+
+// Draw arms with shading and outline
+function drawArms(ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D, x: number, y: number, palette: Record<string, string>, armsPattern: string[]) {
+  for (let py = 0; py < armsPattern.length; py++) {
+    const row = armsPattern[py];
+    for (let px = 0; px < row.length; px++) {
+      const c = row[px];
+      if (c === ' ') continue;
+      const color = palette[c] || OUTLINE_COLOR;
+      drawPixel(ctx, x + px, y + py, color);
+    }
+  }
+  // Outline arms
+  ctx.strokeStyle = OUTLINE_COLOR;
+  ctx.lineWidth = 1;
+  ctx.strokeRect(x, y, armsPattern[0].length, armsPattern.length);
+}
+

+// Main exported function to draw character
+export function drawCharacter(ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D, x: number, y: number, type: CharacterType) {
+  ctx.save();
+  ctx.imageSmoothingEnabled = false;
+  // Base coordinates for character top-left
+  const baseX = x;
+  const baseY = y;
+
+  const p = P;
+  const charData = CHARACTER_SPRITES[type];
+  if (!charData) {
+    ctx.restore();
+    return;
+  }
+  const palette = charData.palette(p);
+
+  // Draw parts in order: legs, torso, arms, head
+  drawLegs(ctx, baseX + 5, baseY + 18, palette, charData.legs);
+  drawTorso(ctx, baseX + 5, baseY + 10, palette, charData.torso);
+  drawArms(ctx, baseX + 2, baseY + 10, palette, charData.arms);
+  drawHead(ctx, baseX + 5, baseY + 4, palette, charData.hair);
+
+  ctx.restore();
+}
+
